html:
Exclusive to:

Fertilizzzer is a character-specific Item craftable only by Wurt with the Itchcraft I skill. Fertilizzzer can be used to fertilize Farm Plants and it restores 12 of each nutrients, or 20 with Itchcraft II. It also can be used as fire fuel.

Gallery

  • Fertilizzzer concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.

"mosquitofertilizer"
“Apparently plants like it.”
–Wilson
“Was the poop by itself not gross enough?”
–Willow
“Blech, little bag smells of month-old borscht!”
–Wolfgang
“The best nourishment is the lifeblood of another.”
–Wendy
“ABSOLUTELY VILE”
–WX-78
“There is a direct correlation between the fertilizer's efficacy and odor.”
–Wickerbottom
“I don't think that's ketchup.”
–Woodie
“Nasty stuff.”
–Maxwell
“Leave it för the farmers.”
–Wigfrid
“It will make the little plants grow big and strong!”
–Webber
“For a bountiful harvest.”
–Warly
“Yum sauce”
–Wormwood
“Just throw a healthy dollop on the ground.”
–Winona
“Methinks it stinks.”
–Wortox
“Made dirt snack for plants, florp!”
–Wurt
“Plants love this stuff.”
–Walter
“This should expedite the growth of my garden, at least.”
–Wanda
Fertilizzzer is a character-specific Item craftable only by Wurt with the Itchcraft I skill. Fertilizzzer can be used to fertilize Farm Plants and it restores 12 of each nutrients, or 20 with Itchcraft II. It also can be used as fire fuel.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Fertilizzzer là một Vật phẩm dành riêng cho nhân vật chỉ có thể chế tạo được bởi Wurt với kỹ năng Itchcraft I. Phân bón có thể được sử dụng để bón phân cho Cây trồng trong Trang trại và nó phục hồi 12 chất dinh dưỡng mỗi loại, hoặc 20 với Itchcraft II. Nó cũng có thể được sử dụng làm nhiên liệu chữa cháy.
